title: A round blinding-shiny UFO was spotted in Brasília-DF [1998]
excerpt: JAN 15th, 1998. Time: 00h40 am. Duration: 5 minutes. In Brasília, Distrito Federal, an unidentified flying object with the “size of an airplane” was spotted by six people on a clear night. According to the witnesses, the big UFO was round, shiny and remained “stopped” most of the time at an altitude of 500 meters. […]
text_preview:
JAN 15th, 1998. Time: 00h40 am. Duration: 5 minutes. In Brasília, Distrito Federal, an unidentified flying object with the “size of an airplane” was spotted by six people on a clear night. According to the witnesses, the big UFO was round, shiny and remained “stopped” most of the time at an altitude of 500 meters. And when he moved, he did it at a “slow speed” towards the North in a straight line. The witness who reported to COMDABRA [Brazilian Aerospace Defense Command] emphasized how “blinding” the UFO light was. 

Cf. ARQUIVO NACIONAL (Brasil). Sistema de Informações do Arquivo Nacional (SI
summary: Six witnesses in Brasília observed a blinding shiny round airplane-sized UFO hovering mostly stationary at 500m altitude before slowly moving North for 5 minutes.
